---
title: Urban Symmetry
slug: urban-symmetry
type: post
status: draft
category: Architecture
tags: [glass, skyscraper]
heroImage: 02-urban-symmetry.jpg
excerpt: "Reflections, repetition, and the geometric music of modern skyscrapers."
---

A study commissioned by an architecture practice for their decade retrospective. The work focuses on a single facade across all four seasons, treating the building as a single subject for an extended photographic essay.
